name: Thresholds / Transitions Install / Replace
basis: Per LINEAR FT. Cut & fasten transition/threshold strip (T-mold, reducer, saddle) between floors; ~8min/LF for a short doorway run, mid-grade strip ~$5/LF. Handyman-legal finish, no debris. Note: a typical single doorway strip is ~3 LF.
sources: Homewyse install threshold transition strip $283-366 per transition; transition labor $1-2.50/LF; material $0.40-5.70/LF; Flooring anchor 'All Flooring, Install Transition Strips' $65/30min/$15 (per-strip each)
